Infrastructure

We Have A State Of Art Manufacturing Facility In Chakan Phase Industrial Area Chakan Pune.

Shop Floor Area

2500 Sq.ft

Corporate Office Area

1200 Sq.ft

EOT Cranes

5 ton & 2.5 ton

Hydra

12 ton

Storage Area

1000 Sq.ft

Working Shop Capacity

10 Tanks per month

Power Of Team Work

KHM Infra Innovations Pvt. Ltd. is a team of highly dedicated professionals with years of experience in the water and wastewater treatment industry. Our team consists of engineers, technicians, and project managers who work together to provide innovative and cost-effective solutions to our clients.

Global Industry Design Standards

Design is carried out as per international standards including ASME, DIN, JIS, BS & IS. Our design team uses the latest software for design and simulation including AutoCAD, SolidWorks, ANSYS and STAAD.

ASME
AutoCAD
ANSYS
STAAD

End-To-End Manufacturing Facility

We have in-house facility for shell rolling, dish end pressing, structure fabrication, hydro testing, sand blasting, painting, packing etc. Our facility is equipped with modern machinery and a quality control department to ensure that all products meet the required specifications.

In-House Process Testing

Internal Testing Facilities for Dye Penetrant Test, Magnetic Particle Testing, Hydrostatic Test, Pneumatic Test, Radiography.

Quality Policy

KHM Infra Innovations Pvt. Ltd.

Chakan, Pune, Maharashtra

Quality Policy

KHM Infra Innovations is committed to meet customer requirements and applicable statutory and regulatory requirements through continual improvement of our quality management system. We strive to deliver products and services that consistently meet quality objectives and enhance customer satisfaction.

KHM Infra Innovations Pvt. Ltd.

Chakan, Pune, Maharashtra

Health, Safety & Environment Policy

We are committed to providing a safe and healthy workplace, preventing injury and ill health, and minimizing environmental impact. We comply with applicable HSE legislation and promote awareness among employees, contractors and visitors on all our sites.

Are you ready for a better more productive business?

Everything you need to build your water & wastewater treatment solution faster than ever before — one partner, end-to-end delivery.

Get a Quote

KHM Infra Innovations delivers advanced water and wastewater treatment systems for residential, industrial and government infrastructure.
